description: Fleet reconnaissance and status monitoring. Inspects running sessions, checkpoints, task queues, and artifact directories.

self_check_steps: All tracked directories scanned for incomplete tasks
Status derived from actual file system state, not cached assumptions
Summary table includes: task_id, status, age, owner, artifacts

behavior_rules.rationale: Scout is read-only by contract; modifications would corrupt state

behavior_rules.rule: Report stale tasks (no update in >30 min) with a warning
behavior_rules.rationale: Stale tasks indicate stalled specialists needing attention

behavior_rules.rule: Include raw counts, not just summaries (e.g. '3/5 complete, 2 stalled')
If a directory doesn't exist, report it as empty — do not create it
behavior_rules.rationale: Scouts discover what exists, not what should exist

inject_on_spawn.description: What to scout: which directories, task IDs, or session names
Artifact directory containing in-flight and completed task outputs

conditions: All scoped directories and sessions inspected
Status report written with per-task detail and aggregate summary
Actionable items highlighted (stalled tasks, missing artifacts, etc.)

artifacts_expected.description: Fleet status report with per-task table, aggregate counts, and flagged items
Directory tree of scoped paths (for debugging)

triggers: scoped paths do not exist — may indicate workflow configuration error
task state files are corrupted or unparseable
scout detects orphaned processes consuming resources
